title: 2 High-Yield Dividend Stocks to Buy Before the End of 2022
text: These two stocks are positioned for growth in 2023.

title: HealthTrust and Ardent Health Services Renew Long-Standing GPO Agreement
text: NASHVILLE, Tenn.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--HealthTrust Performance Group, a comprehensive healthcare improvement organization, and Ardent Health Services, one of the largest private integrated health systems in the U.S., today announced the renewal of their exclusive, decades-long relationship for supply chain resiliency and group purchasing. Under a new ten-year agreement, Ardent providers are assured of advantages in pricing and contracting across a broad portfolio of healthcare supplies and services.

title: Ventas: There Are Better Choices In Healthcare REITs
text: Thanks to the selloff in REITs this year, there are a number of strong Medical REITs on sale at attractive prices. Ventas, Inc. is not one of them. Lackluster growth, problematic dividends, mounting debts, and mediocre valuation all indicate that Ventas, Inc. is a company that is uninspiring at best.

title: Ventas Declares Fourth Quarter 2022 Dividend of $0.45 per Common Share
text: CHICAGO--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per common share. The dividend will be payable in cash on January 19, 2023 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on January 3, 2023.

title: This High-Yield Dividend Stock May Finally Be Ready to Start Growing Again
text: Ventas was hit hard during the early days of the coronavirus pandemic, but it is on the cusp of a recovery.
